ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that collected the data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "wind_direction" REAL /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "pm2_5" REAL /* Particulate matter PM2.5 in micrograms per cubic meter */,
  "pm10" REAL /* Particulate matter PM10 in micrograms per cubic meter */,
  "uv_index" REAL /* UV index */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in millimeters */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in kilometers */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level of the sensor */,
  "signal_strength" REAL /* Signal strength of the sensor */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., good, bad, unknown) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of sensor */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of last calibration */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule for regular maintenance (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES sensor_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., urban, rural, coastal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the data category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data category */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit of measurement */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit of measurement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit of measurement */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the unit of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data_categories" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data category mapping */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data category */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit of measurement */,
  "sampling_rate" REAL /* Sampling rate of the sensor data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES data_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_categories_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_categories_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES data_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., field technician, data analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_params" TEXT /* Query parameters used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., calibration, repair) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or remarks about the maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for next maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_maintenance_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert threshold */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data category */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit of measurement */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value for the threshold */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value for the threshold */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., warning, critical) */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method for notifying users (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_thresholds_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES data_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_thresholds_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES data_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data point */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made to the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the data source */,
  "sync_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of data synchronization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message sent to the user */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
